title: Command Cockpit Focus Beam
summary: Selected Quest nodes now drive a generated focus-beam reticle inside the existing cockpit board.

verification.intent: Improve animation quality by making motion follow the clicked path node instead of adding another scrolling report row.
verification.layout: The focus beam is absolutely positioned inside .quest-field and uses computed focus percentage variables.
verification.motion: The beam uses transform and opacity animation with mobile compression rules.
